repo_authored_files.purpose: Common adapter metadata for the repository-owned HAProxy/SPOP implementation; no host-runtime claim by itself
Common adapter metadata declarations for the HAProxy/SPOP implementation
canonical host-model and per-capability state declaration; runtime promotion requires separate evidence
compile the metadata object, local SPOA agent starter, and diagnostic SPOP subset
local request-decision starter logic; no SPOP frame parser and no HAProxy runtime handling
CLI entry point for --describe and --self-test only

SPOP runtime that parses live HAProxy request and optional response notifications, returns typed decision variables, and writes metadata-only decision JSONL with fixed reason codes; not a full SPOA protocol implementation
local libmodsecurity binding used by self-tests and live HAProxy YAML request-side runtime; loads materialized rules and processes URI, headers, request body bytes, and CRS SQLi cases
request/evaluation declarations for the local ModSecurity binding self-tests and SPOP runtime
CLI entry point for the local ModSecurity binding self-tests

shared_inputs.purpose: connector-neutral request shape used by the local starter self-test
connector-neutral intervention shape used by the local starter self-test
connector-neutral status values used by the local starter self-test
connector-neutral intervention helper linked into the local starter binary

starter_capabilities: compile local SPOA agent starter binary
run local self-test for synthetic request allow/block decisions
compile and self-test SPOP HELLO/ACK/DISCONNECT handling
compile and self-test local libmodsecurity phase-1 header and request-body transactions
verify live HAProxy enforcement for shared request-side YAML cases
verify live HAProxy With-CRS enforcement for crs_sqli_anomaly_block
verify REQUEST_URI, REQUEST_HEADERS, REQUEST_HEADERS_NAMES, ARGS, ARGS_NAMES, REQUEST_COOKIES, REQUEST_COOKIES_NAMES, REQUEST_BODY, FILES, and XML request-side variables
blocked_dependencies: full production SPOA/SPOP implementation beyond the request-side runtime subset
non-403 disruptive status and redirect mapping evidence
claims_not_made: SPOE/SPOA protocol compatibility beyond the request-side runtime subset
